title: Full Biolink/SHACL validation + cross-source contradiction report
context: With Reactome, Open Targets, and ClinVar integrated (M2 complete), the full multi-source graph must be validated as a whole. Beyond structural Biolink/SHACL validation, a cross-source contradiction report is needed: cases where different sources make conflicting assertions about the same entity or relationship must be surfaced, retained, and reported to reviewers rather than silently resolved.
objective: Implement full Biolink/SHACL validation of the complete multi-source graph, generate a cross-source contradiction report listing conflicting assertions with their sources, and ensure all identifier-resolution and provenance-completeness gates pass.
acceptanceCriteria: The whole graph passes Biolink/SHACL structural validation.
A cross-source contradiction report is generated listing conflicting assertions with source provenance on each side; contradictions are retained, not silently resolved.
The contradiction report is human-readable and links to the specific assertions.
Validation and report generation are integrated into the CI pipeline and run on graph data PRs.
output: validate/ directory with full validation scripts and a generated cross-source contradiction report (output/contradiction-report.md), committed via PR with CI green.
